purpose: Diagnose database-source separability before any pooled four-class model
value_transform: log10 positive values; fold-local median imputation
iron_harmonization: GEOROC FEO_EQ and PetDB harmonized FEOT, both total iron as FeO equivalent
interpretation: Missingness-only predictability is direct evidence that measurement coverage contains database/source signal. Value-based predictability cannot separate geologic MORB-vs-non-MORB differences from database effects because class and source are perfectly confounded in the current pooled design.
claim_gate: Do not report a naive GEOROC ARC/CIB/OIB plus PetDB MORB four-class score as source-robust performance. Acquire overlapping tectonic classes across sources.
